data.title: Monroe Capital Corporation BDC Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: In Chicago on March 5, 2026, Monroe Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: MRCC) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The Board of Directors announced a first quarter distribution of $0.09 per share, scheduled for payment on March 31, 2026, for stockholders listed on record as of March 16, 2026.

data.title: Profound Medical Q4 Earnings Assessment
data.description: Profund Medical, trading under NASDAQ as PROF, released its Q4 earnings on March 5, 2026, at 04:05 PM. The earnings report revealed that their EPS was $-0.27, in line with analysts' expectations of $-0.27. However, revenue saw a positive trend, increasing by $1.80 million compared to the previous year. This showcases a steady growth for the company. In the prior quarter, Profound Medical outperformed expectations. For a detailed analysis, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Greenidge Generation Reports Preliminary Financial and Operating Results for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025
data.description: Greenidge Generation Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GREE), a power generation company specializing in datacenters and infrastructure, revealed its preliminary financial and operating outcomes for Q4 and fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. In the latest quarter, the company obtained approval for 100MW of additional power capacity for its datacenters. This signifies growth in the company's operations and its focus on expanding its services.

data.title: Aptiv Board of Directors Approves Spin-Off of Versigent
data.description: Aptiv PLC, a global industrial technology company traded on NYSE as APTV, has approved the spin-off of its Electrical Distribution Systems business into a new publicly traded company, Versigent. The record date for this spin-off is set as of the close of trading on March 17, 2026, (New York City time). This move will result in the distribution of shares in Versigent to shareholders at a specified ratio. Versigent is poised to become an independent entity following this strategic decision by Aptiv's Board of Directors.

data.title: Bragg Gaming to Release Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results on March 19
data.description: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group, a prominent iGaming content and platform technology solutions provider listed on NASDAQ as BRAG and TSX as BRAG, announced it will disclose its Q4 and full year financial outcomes for 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, March 19, 2026. The disclosure will be accompanied by an 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time conference call featuring CEO Matevž Mazij and CFO.

data.title: Hub Group (HUBG) Shares Crater Amid Admitted Improper Accounting - Hagens Berman
data.description: Investors who suffered losses in Hub Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HUBG) are advised to reach out to Hagens Berman as the share price dropped by over 27% during trading on February 6, 2026. The decline followed the company's filing of a current report cautioning investors.

data.title: Prologis to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results April 16, 2026
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) announced that they will be conducting a webcast and conference call featuring senior management to review their first-quarter results, market conditions, and outlook for the future on April 16, 2026. The event is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. PT/12:00 p.m. ET. This opportunity to join the discussion offers insights into the company's performance, strategies, and vision moving forward.

data.title: Azitra, Inc. Announces Cancellation of 2026 Special Meeting of Stockholders
data.description: In Branford, Connecticut, on March 5, 2026, Azitra, Inc. (NYSE American: AZTR), a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in precision dermatology treatments, disclosed the cancellation of the Company's special event.

data.title: ASUR Announces Total Passenger Traffic for February 2026
data.description: In Colombia, passenger traffic saw a 4.7% annual increase, while in Mexico it rose by 1.6%. However, in Puerto Rico, there was a 2.1% decrease in passenger traffic. The Grupo Aeroportuario del Sureste, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: ASR; BMV: ASUR), a prominent international airport group, reported these statistics.

data.title: Kyverna Therapeutics to Present New Data from Neuroimmunology Franchise at AAN 2026
data.description: A forthcoming oral presentation will present the primary analysis from the KYSA-8 registrational trial focused on stiff person syndrome (SPS). This late-breaking presentation is anticipated to unveil crucial findings from the trial, indicating significant advancements in understanding and potentially treating SPS. The presentation is expected to cover vital data and outcomes from the trial, with a particular emphasis on key numbers and results that could impact the future management of SPS. The inclusion of this primary analysis in a late-breaking session underscores its importance within the medical community, signaling a potential shift in the approach to addressing SPS.

data.title: Support Our Seniors, Protect Hours of Work! CUPE Members Rally Outside Sienna Senior Living's Head Office to Defend Hours of Work from Employer Cuts
data.description: A leading Long Term Care provider in Canada, Sienna Senior Living, has been recognized for its profitability in operating homes nationwide thanks to government subsidies and public investments. Despite Ontario's recent $4.9 billion funding injection aimed at supporting staffing and retention for Personal Support Workers (PSWs), Sienna Senior Living has decided to reduce 1,300 full-time hours at the Case Manor facility in Bobcaygeon, marking a concerning turn of events.

data.title: Travelzoo Promotes Travel Enthusiasm at World's Largest Travel Trade Show
data.description: In Berlin on March 5, 2026, Travelzoo® (NASDAQ: TZOO) took the spotlight at ITB Berlin as a hub for travel aficionados. The company showcased the vibrancy and fullness of the travel experience through a 12-meter (40 feet) wide LED display.

data.title: Marvell Technology Delivers Strong Q4 Results Driven By 'Robust' AI Demand
data.description: Marvell Technology Inc (NASDAQ: MRVL) released its fiscal 2026 fourth-quarter financial results, which indicated revenue of $2.22 billion, surpassing the estimated $2.21 billion. The company's adjusted earnings stood at 80 cents per share, exceeding projections of 79 cents per share. In comparison to last year, total revenue witnessed a 22% increase, primarily propelled by strong demand for AI technology. Marvell Technology stock is encountering resistance as its shares have started to decline post the financial report's release. For more details, visit a full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Scotch-Brite is shaking up the way Gen Z and Millennial consumers think about everyday cleaning essentials
data.description: Introducing Brite by Scotch-Brite™, a dynamic new series aimed at enhancing daily cleaning tasks with a touch of elegance, efficient functionality, and a joyful cleaning experience. Launched in St. Paul, Minnesota on March 5, 2026, this exclusive line promises to revolutionize your cleaning routine. data.title: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results and Provides Outlook for 2026
data.description: Dallas-based Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (NYSE: GRNT) announced their financial and operational outcomes for Q4 and full-year 2025, also offering a preliminary outlook for 2026. In Q4 2025, they achieved a 27% rise in overall production, reaching 35,120 barrels of oil equivalent per day, with 49% being oil production. The company disclosed a net loss of $25.1 million, or $(0.19) per share. Adjusted Net Income (non-GAAP) stood at $1.5 million, or $0.01 per share.
